name: WLF_GRW_GUIDE_RELATIONS
description: Table to store relations between guides and related child objects like sq guides, tasks, resources, skills etc.

columns.Name: GUIDE_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: GUIDE_RELATION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: UserKey for uniquely identifying guide relation.

columns.Name: GUIDE_ID
columns.Comments: ID of guide associated with the relation

columns.Name: GUIDE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of Object Related (E.g. Task, Resources etc)

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the guide relation (e.g Active, InActive etc.)

columns.Name: RELATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of Object Related (E.g. Task, Resources etc)

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Type of Object Related (E.g. Learning, Journey etc)

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the object related to guide.

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of Object Related (E.g. Course, Journey Task etc)

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_SUBTYPE
columns.Comments: Sub Type of Object Related (E.g. Book, Online Course, Article etc)

columns.Name: ADDED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the relation was added to guide.

columns.Name: REMOVED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the relation was removed from guide.

columns.Name: PREV_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the predecessor relation to maintain order of position.

columns.Name: NEXT_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the successor relation to maintain order of position.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
